name: Linguine with Sun-Dried Tomatoes and Toasted Pignoli Garlic Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil for the pasta.
2. Toast pignoli nuts lightly in an oven or nonstick Teflon fry pan.
3. In a large skillet or saucepan, sauté garlic and shallots in olive oil over low heat until fragrant.
4. Add white wine and reduce by half.
5. Stir in half-and-half, then add bouillon crystals and reduce again by half.
6. Mix in tomato paste, basil, toasted pignoli nuts, sun-dried tomatoes, and parsley. Stir well to combine.
7. Cook pasta in the boiling water until just al dente. Drain and reserve some pasta cooking liquid.
8. Add drained pasta to the skillet with the sauce, tossing to coat evenly.
9. Transfer the pasta and sauce to a serving dish. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
10. Serve immediately and enjoy!
